routes.purpose: Project-scoped daily operations home screen with draggable widget grid
Org-level executive risk summary with volatility, MCI, OS score, data integrity
Printable/shareable executive risk report — same data as /executive but print-optimized layout
Portfolio-level financial insights: variance leaderboard, trend charts, recommendations
Project-scoped risk, cost rollup, variance, receipt lag, safety compliance KPIs
Internal diagnostics: test runner, scenario suite, margin inspector, ops tools, change feed, executive report
Org-level data quality: missing cost rates, unmatched time, unclassified receipts, missing budgets, overlaps
Snapshot backfill tool and run history log
Prompts audit runner with pass/fail checks across server and client

role_gates: Only isPM, isForeman, isAdmin see the dashboard

sections.title: Header Card
sections.purpose: Title, certification badge, action buttons

sections.title: Daily Snapshot Strip
sections.purpose: At-a-glance: weather, crew count, active trades, tasks starting/finishing, blocked count
sections.data_source: daily_logs table (most recent), tasks table, project_members table
actions: Click opens WeatherInfoModal, CrewInfoModal, ActiveTradesModal, SnapshotDetailModal (starting), SnapshotDetailModal (finishing), BlockersPreviewModal
sections.empty_state: Shows 0 values when no daily log exists

sections.title: Metrics Widget
sections.purpose: Open tasks, blocked tasks, upcoming tasks, safety forms this week

sections.title: Activity Widget
sections.purpose: 7-day completion trend chart

sections.title: Health Widget
sections.purpose: Project health score (0-100) with at-risk, blocked, overdue counts

sections.title: Distribution Widget
sections.purpose: Task status distribution (not started, in progress, blocked)

sections.title: My Day Widget
sections.purpose: Top 5 priority tasks due within 3 days

sections.title: Safety Widget
sections.purpose: Safety forms today, this week, incidents

sections.title: Blockers Widget
sections.purpose: Unresolved blockers list

sections.title: Economic Health Widget
sections.purpose: Project-level economic health summary

sections.title: Header
sections.purpose: Title, refresh button, copy summary button
sections.empty_state: Click Load Dashboard prompt with BarChart3 icon
sections.loading_state: Button shows animate-spin on RefreshCw icon

sections.title: Portfolio Volatility Index
sections.purpose: Revenue-weighted average risk across all active projects (0-100)

sections.title: Margin Control Index
sections.purpose: MCI = 100 - (at_risk / active * 100), clamped 0-100
sections.rpc: rpc_get_executive_risk_summary → computed client-side from at_risk_count, projects_active_count

sections.title: OS Health + Project Counts
sections.purpose: OS Score with tier badge, active/at-risk/volatile/stable counts, avg projected margin, top risk causes

sections.title: Top Risk Projects
sections.purpose: Up to N project cards with risk bar, position badge, executive summary

sections.title: Data Integrity Panel
sections.purpose: Structural data issues: zero revenue, no estimate, unrated labor, negative margin without COs
sections.empty_state: All active projects passed integrity checks

sections.title: OS Health
sections.purpose: OS Score, tier, breakdown grid

sections.title: Projects at Risk
sections.purpose: Active/at-risk/volatile/stable counts + avg margin

sections.title: Top Risk Causes
sections.purpose: Bar chart of top 5 risk causes with tooltips

sections.title: Top Risk Projects
sections.purpose: Project cards with risk bar, position badge, executive summary

sections.title: Value Narrative
sections.purpose: Text-based guardrail mode analysis

role_gates: isGlobalAdmin check via useProjectRole — but no explicit redirect if not admin (shows all data anyway)

sections.title: Filters Bar
sections.purpose: Status filter, date range, data quality checkboxes

sections.title: KPI Cards
sections.purpose: Total contract value, total actual cost, avg margin (weighted), over budget count

sections.title: Weekly AI Ops Summary
sections.purpose: AI-generated weekly ops summary

sections.title: Recommendations
sections.purpose: Top 5 portfolio recommendations from rules engine

sections.title: Trend Charts
sections.purpose: Margin, cost, and over-budget trends from snapshots
sections.empty_state: No weekly snapshots yet — link to generate

sections.title: Scope Estimation Learning
sections.purpose: Org-level scope accuracy metrics

sections.title: Operational Patterns
sections.purpose: Org-wide operational pattern detection

sections.title: Variance Leaderboard
sections.purpose: Paginated table of all projects sorted by worst variance, with data quality flags
actions: Set budget button for missing-budget projects

role_gates: isGlobalAdmin || canManageProject check — shows NoAccess component if neither

sections.title: Project Selector
sections.purpose: Select a project to view intelligence data

sections.title: Risk Score
sections.purpose: Project risk score with risk level badge and drivers list

sections.title: Unrated Labor Exposure
sections.purpose: Hours and entries without cost rates

sections.title: Integrity & Variance
sections.purpose: Integrity score, budget variance %, labor variance %, blockers

sections.title: Receipt Approval Lag
sections.purpose: Avg lag days, pending count, oldest pending

sections.title: Safety Compliance
sections.purpose: Compliance percentage, gap count, forms submitted

sections.title: Auth Probe
sections.purpose: Verify client session exists

sections.title: DB Auth Probe
sections.purpose: Verify DB-level auth via rpc_whoami

sections.title: AI Brain Test Runner
sections.purpose: Runs existence, security, privileges, smoke, determinism checks

sections.title: Scenario Suite Runner
sections.purpose: Run margin control against 6 edge-case projects

sections.title: Margin Edge-Case Suite
sections.purpose: 4 deterministic edge-case project archetypes

sections.title: Margin Payload Inspector
sections.purpose: Show exact live output of margin control payload for any project

sections.title: Quick Probe (3 Projects)
sections.purpose: Deterministic 3-project probe with parallel RPC calls

sections.title: Seed Margin Test Project
sections.purpose: Create deterministic test project with burn exceeding estimate

sections.title: Release Report
sections.purpose: Generate release readiness report

sections.title: OS Operations Panel
sections.purpose: Ops toolbox: release report, capture snapshots, volatility, executive report, executive brief (change feed)

sections.title: Determinism Re-scan
sections.purpose: Check for non-deterministic function violations

sections.title: Margin Inputs Trace
sections.purpose: Raw numeric inputs consumed by margin engine for any project

sections.title: Data Quality Audit
sections.purpose: Auto-fetched on mount — data quality audit results

sections.title: RPC Inspector
sections.purpose: Call arbitrary RPCs and view raw JSON results
sections.rpc: Multiple RPCs defined in ALL_RPCS constant

role_gates: isAdmin || isPM() — shows NoAccess if neither

sections.title: Summary Badge
sections.purpose: Total issues count

sections.title: Missing Cost Rates
sections.purpose: Workers with $0 cost rate across projects

sections.title: Unmatched Time Entries
sections.purpose: Time entries where user is not a project member

sections.title: Unclassified Receipts
sections.purpose: Receipts without cost_type classification

sections.title: Missing Budgets
sections.purpose: Active projects without budget records

sections.title: Overlapping Time Entries
sections.purpose: Workers with overlapping time entries on same day

sections.title: Cross-Project Task References
sections.purpose: Time entries linked to tasks from a different project

role_gates: isGlobalAdmin || orgRole=admin || orgRole=pm — shows NoAccess if not

sections.title: Backfill Controls
sections.purpose: Select weeks to backfill and trigger snapshot generation

sections.title: Run History Log
sections.purpose: History of snapshot runs with success/fail status

sections.title: Prompts Audit
sections.purpose: Run 10+ checks across server/client with PASS/FAIL/NEEDS_MANUAL status

rpc_usage.purpose: Org-level risk summary with OS score, tier, volatility index, project counts, top causes, top risk projects, data integrity
rpc_usage.data_returned: { org_id, projects_active_count, at_risk_count, volatile_count, stable_count, avg_projected_margin_at_completion_percent, top_risk_projects[], top_causes[], os_score, data_integrity, volatility_index }

rpc_usage.purpose: Run existence, security, privileges, smoke, determinism checks on AI brain layer
rpc_usage.data_returned: { ok, existence, security, privileges, smoke, determinism }

rpc_usage.purpose: Run margin control RPC against up to 6 edge-case projects
Run margin control against 4 deterministic edge-case project archetypes

where_used: /insights/ai-brain (AIBrainDiagnostics) — Margin Payload Inspector and Quick Probe
rpc_usage.purpose: Show exact live margin control payload for any project
rpc_usage.data_returned: { project_id, org_id, keys_present[], intervention_flags_type, intervention_flags_value[], margin_control_payload }
rpc_usage.ui_component: Margin Payload Inspector, Quick Probe grid

rpc_usage.purpose: Expose raw numeric inputs consumed by margin engine
Verify DB-level auth identity
Release readiness report
rpc_usage.ui_component: Release Report panel, OS Operations panel

Per-project volatility scores over 30 days
Generate full executive report with top risks, unstable, improving, financial exposure
rpc_usage.data_returned: { success, summary, top_risks[], most_unstable_projects[], improving_projects[], financial_exposure, notes[] }
rpc_usage.ui_component: Executive Report panel in OS Operations

rpc_usage.purpose: Compare latest vs previous snapshot: new risks, resolved, improving, worsening, burn increases, top changes, attention_ranked_projects
rpc_usage.data_returned: { success, org_id, latest_snapshot_date, previous_snapshot_date, changes{}, top_changes[], attention_ranked_projects[] }
rpc_usage.ui_component: Executive Brief panel in OS Operations

rpc_usage.purpose: Data quality audit results
rpc_usage.ui_component: Data Quality section in OS Operations

rpc_usage.purpose: System inventory including aggregation_determinism_scan
Backfill N weeks of economic snapshots
Project-level risk score, risk level, projected margin, drivers
rpc_usage.data_returned: { risk_score, risk_level, projected_margin, projected_final_cost, drivers[], currency }

rpc_usage.purpose: Project cost rollup including unrated labor exposure
Integrity score, budget/labor variance, blockers
Portfolio-level financial data per project
rpc_usage.data_returned: Array of project rows with contract_value, actual_total_cost, planned_total_cost, total_cost_delta, has_budget, actual_margin_percent, etc.

rpc_usage.purpose: Create deterministic test project for margin testing
Run 10+ audit checks across server and client

hidden_sections: /executive and /executive-report have no role gates — accessible but not in nav
Same hidden-but-accessible issue as PM for /executive, /insights/ai-brain
All dashboards hidden — nav tier field only shows Tasks, Time, Safety, Receipts
All dashboards hidden — nav tier minimal only shows Tasks, Time, Receipts

duplicates.notes: Two different RPCs compute volatility differently. Executive uses revenue-weighted aggregate; diagnostics uses per-project 30-day volatility with labels (critical/volatile/watch/stable). Not truly duplicated data, but the concept appears twice with different granularity.
Four different surfaces show data quality information using four different data sources and logic. No single authoritative surface.

/executive and /executive-report both call the same RPC but render differently (interactive vs printable). Diagnostics calls a DIFFERENT RPC (rpc_generate_executive_report) that returns different data (top_risks, most_unstable_projects, improving_projects, financial_exposure). Three executive-level views with overlapping but not identical data.
Identical data, different layouts (interactive vs print). Acceptable duplication.
Three surfaces showing top risk projects using two different RPCs.
Same RPC called from two different sections within the same page.
Margin Inputs Trace appears to be rendered TWICE in the same page with separate state variables but identical UI. Likely a copy-paste duplication.

unused_features.status: Returned by RPC but NOT rendered in UI
unused_features.location: The Executive Brief panel in AIBrainDiagnostics renders top_changes but does NOT render attention_ranked_projects
unused_features.recommendation: Surface on /executive or create a dedicated attention-priority widget

unused_features.status: Route exists but not present in useNavigationTabs — only reachable by direct URL
unused_features.recommendation: Add to nav for admin/PM roles or link from /insights

unused_features.recommendation: Link from /executive dashboard or add to nav

unused_features.recommendation: Consider adding to nav for admin tier

unused_features.recommendation: Acceptable as sub-page, but could benefit from link in /insights sidebar

strengths: Clean widget grid with customizable layout
Daily snapshot strip is excellent — high-density, actionable at-a-glance
Good use of modals for drill-down from snapshot strip
issues: 573-line monolith with all query logic, metrics computation, and rendering in one file
8 queries fire on mount even if user only cares about 2-3 widgets
EconomicHealthWidget data source is opaque from parent — can't assess redundancy

strengths: Clear visual hierarchy: PVI → MCI → OS Score → Risk Projects → Data Integrity
Tooltips explain every metric with formulas
Copy summary button is excellent for stakeholder communication
issues: Requires manual click to load — no auto-fetch on mount
Not in navigation — discoverability is zero for users who don't know the URL
No role gating — any authenticated user can access executive financial data

strengths: Print-optimized layout with @media print styles
Value Narrative section adds guardrail analysis
Clean separation from /executive for different use cases
issues: Nearly identical to /executive — duplicates 80% of the UI code
Not linked from anywhere in navigation
No role gating

strengths: Comprehensive filtering (status, date range, data quality)
Paginated variance leaderboard with data quality flags
Good use of sub-navigation buttons to /snapshots and /data-health
issues: Dense — KPIs, AI summary, recommendations, 3 trend charts, scope learning, operational patterns, AND variance table all on one page
WeeklyInsightCard and OperationalPatternsPanel data sources unknown without reading child components
No skeleton for WeeklyInsightCard or OperationalPatternsPanel

strengths: Clean 5-card KPI layout
Each card has traceSource tooltip showing exact data provenance
Proper role gating with NoAccess fallback
issues: Project selector resets to empty on mount — no default selection
No links to drill deeper into any KPI
Receipt lag card conditionally hidden — could confuse users expecting 5 cards

strengths: Comprehensive — covers every diagnostic tool in one place
All panels have copy JSON buttons
Auth probes at top give immediate feedback on session health
issues: 3,133 lines in a single file — extreme monolith with 30+ state variables
Margin Inputs Trace appears TWICE (duplicate section with duplicate state)
No role gating — internal diagnostic tools accessible to any authenticated user
Mixes developer tools (seed test project, determinism scan) with executive tools (Executive Brief, Executive Report)
Cognitive overload — 14+ sections in one scrollable page with no tabs or navigation

strengths: Clear problem-oriented sections with counts
Proper role gating (admin/PM only)
Refresh button for on-demand re-scan
issues: 6+ sequential queries on mount — could be consolidated into one RPC
Not in navigation — only reachable from /insights button
No severity ranking across sections

strengths: Simple, focused tool with clear purpose
Run history table with success/fail status
Proper role gating
issues: Not in navigation — only reachable from /insights
No automatic snapshot scheduling visibility

global_issues: AIBrainDiagnostics.tsx at 3,133 lines is the largest file in the codebase — needs decomposition
No role gating on /executive, /executive-report, /insights/ai-brain — sensitive financial and diagnostic data exposed
Data quality concept fragmented across 4 surfaces with 4 different implementations
Executive-level RPCs (rpc_generate_executive_report, rpc_executive_change_feed) only accessible from diagnostic page

improvement_opportunities.title: Decompose AIBrainDiagnostics.tsx
improvement_opportunities.description: Split the 3,133-line monolith into at minimum 3 files: DiagnosticTestRunner (auth probes, test runner, scenario suite, edge cases), MarginInspector (payload inspector, quick probe, inputs trace, seed), and OpsPanel (release report, snapshots, volatility, executive report, change feed). Remove the duplicate Margin Inputs Trace section.
improvement_opportunities.impact: Maintainability, cognitive load, eliminates dead code

improvement_opportunities.title: Surface Executive Brief and attention_ranked_projects on /executive
improvement_opportunities.description: Move the Executive Brief (rpc_executive_change_feed) and attention_ranked_projects to the /executive dashboard as first-class widgets. Currently these powerful features are buried in diagnostics.
improvement_opportunities.impact: Stakeholder value — executives can see snapshot-over-snapshot changes without navigating to /insights/ai-brain

improvement_opportunities.title: Add role gating to sensitive routes
improvement_opportunities.description: Add explicit role checks to /executive, /executive-report, and /insights/ai-brain. At minimum, executive routes should require admin/PM. Diagnostics should require admin.
improvement_opportunities.impact: Security — prevents field workers from accessing financial data and diagnostic tools

improvement_opportunities.title: Unify data quality into a single authoritative surface
improvement_opportunities.description: Create a single DataQuality component/RPC that is the source of truth, consumed by /data-health, /executive DataIntegrityPanel, /insights quality filters, and diagnostics. Currently 4 different implementations with different logic.
improvement_opportunities.impact: Consistency, reduced maintenance, single source of truth

improvement_opportunities.title: Add hidden routes to navigation
improvement_opportunities.description: Add /executive to nav for admin tier. Link /data-health and /insights/snapshots from /insights sub-nav (already done via buttons, but could be more prominent). Consider adding /executive-report as a sub-action of /executive.
improvement_opportunities.impact: Discoverability — users currently need to know URLs

improvement_opportunities.title: Auto-fetch on /executive mount
improvement_opportunities.description: Currently /executive requires clicking 'Load Dashboard' to fetch data. Auto-fetch on mount with the refresh button as a secondary action.
improvement_opportunities.impact: UX — one less click for the primary use case

improvement_opportunities.title: Refactor Dashboard.tsx queries
improvement_opportunities.description: Extract the 8 queries and computed metrics from Dashboard.tsx into a custom hook (useDashboardData). The 573-line file mixes data fetching, metric computation, and rendering.

improvement_opportunities.title: Consolidate /executive and /executive-report
improvement_opportunities.description: 80% of the UI code is duplicated between these two pages. Extract shared components (TierIcon, TierBadge, PositionBadge, RiskBar, CauseRow) into a shared module. The print-specific layout could be a variant or print stylesheet on a single page.
